name: AutoSlay Unlock
author: Thebuda4
description: Dev/testing tool that unlocks and extends the built-in AutoSlay automated runner. Adds an AUTO SLAY button to the main menu. Configurable via autoslay_settings.json: choose character (random/silent/regent/defect/necrobinder), after-run behaviour (close/menu/loop), and verbose debug logging. Press F9 during a run to pause/resume AutoSlay. Does not alter cards, balance, or game rules.
